response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in C/C++, Java, and Dlang, but lacks direct C++ development on Windows platforms and domain expertise in fixed income or capital markets. While SQL experience is present, it is not with SQL Server or Oracle as required. The resume shows strong generalist software development skills but does not align closely with the specific technical or domain requirements of the role.
strengths: Strong C/C++ experience (10+ years across embedded, desktop, and low-latency systems)
Solid SQL experience with MongoDB and MySQL
Proven track record in full-stack development and system optimization
concerns: No explicit C++ development on Windows platform (required expertise)
Lacks fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
SQL Server or Oracle experience not mentioned (only MongoDB/MySQL)
